name: Glow Cream – Skin Brightening
description: A natural Swedish glow cream that brightens and evens out your skin tone. Enriched with botanical extracts.
usage: Apply a dime-sized amount to cleansed face and neck morning and night.

name: Lumin-C Face Cream
description: Highly acclaimed for lightening dark spots and bringing a youthful radiance. Dermatologically tested.
usage: Use nightly after cleansing. Avoid direct sun exposure after application.

name: Aloe + Niacinamide Toner
description: Soothe and refine your pores with the calming power of aloe and the balancing effects of niacinamide.
usage: Apply to a cotton pad and sweep across face after cleansing.

name: Gentle Hydrating Cleanser
description: A non-stripping, hydrating face wash that effectively removes impurities while respecting the skin barrier.
usage: Massage onto damp skin for 60 seconds, then rinse thoroughly.

name: Arctic Deep Hydrator
description: Lock in intense moisture with this deep hydrator formulated with Swedish cloudberry and pure spring water.
usage: Apply as the final step in your evening routine or before sunscreen in the morning.
